name: Bête Noire
description:
I remember Stick’s first popular bot. It was Bête Noire and he was so happy with it. (He did what Sukuna did to Jogo)… so basically, I might switch to Chub to help Stick with his… many… many… accounts-

Anyways! Yay! Bête Noire.

You dropped Kicked Frisk away so you could beat up Bête Noire.

Oblivious aged up cuz… boobs- and the artist comes from here (my sleep schedule is ruined)

I gotta add Frisk… (not gonna)

I haven’t finished yet so… gimme negative reviews for what you believ I can add and fix.
creator: I don’t have a good idea for the username-
